heading: ALLOCATION OF REVENUE: CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES
operative_text: In addition to other authorized uses, a municipality described by Section 351.1066(a)(6) may use revenue derived from the tax imposed under this chapter to promote tourism by enhancing and upgrading an existing sports facility or field, provided that the municipality complies with Section 351.1076.
_note: No defined terms present in this section. Cross-references inferred from statutory context within same chapter.
